name: BitGo Institutional Digital Asset API
what_it_does: BitGo institutional digital asset custody and prime services REST API for exchanges, institutional investors, family offices, and fintech companies to manage multi-signature wallet custody, settlement, and prime brokerage services. Enables AI agents to manage multi-signature wallet creation and key management for institutional crypto custody automation, handle transaction building and signing for digital asset transfer automation, access wallet balance and UTXO management for portfolio accounting automation, retrieve transaction history and address management for crypto reconciliation automation, manage express signing service for single-key co-signing automation, handle staking delegation and reward management for proof-of-stake yield automation, access BitGo Prime lending and borrowing for institutional credit automation, retrieve settlement and clearing for institutional trade settlement automation, manage sub-wallet and account segregation for crypto custodian client account automation, and integrate BitGo with exchange APIs, prime brokers, and accounting systems for end-to-end institutional digital asset operations.
use_cases: Securing institutional wallets from multi-sig custody automation agents
Settling trades from institutional crypto prime brokerage agents
Staking assets from proof-of-stake yield automation agents
Reconciling holdings from crypto portfolio accounting agents
not_for: Retail user wallet management (use Coinbase or Kraken retail APIs)
DeFi-native protocol interaction without custody requirement (use direct chain RPC)
NFT retail marketplace (use OpenSea or Rarible)
best_when: An exchange, institutional investor, family office, or fintech company wanting AI agents to automate multi-signature digital asset custody, institutional trade settlement, staking yield management, and prime lending within BitGo's institutional digital asset platform.
avoid_when: QUALIFIED CUSTODIAN STATUS FOR RIA DIGITAL ASSET CUSTODY: BitGo Trust Company is a qualified custodian in South Dakota; automated RIA digital asset custody workflows must verify current qualified custodian status and applicable state trust company regulatory standing; SEC's evolving digital asset custody rule creates regulatory uncertainty for automated qualified custodian digital asset custody. BSA/AML PROGRAM FOR INSTITUTIONAL TRANSFERS: Automated digital asset transfer services via BitGo that meet the definition of Money Services Business require FinCEN registration and AML program; automated institutional transfer workflows must maintain OFAC screening and SAR filing procedures; automated transfer without OFAC screening creates sanctions violation exposure. MULTI-SIG QUORUM AVAILABILITY FOR TIME-SENSITIVE TRANSFERS: BitGo multi-sig requires defined signing key quorum (typically 2-of-3); automated transfer workflows must verify key holder availability before time-sensitive settlement; automated settlement that depends on single-threaded sequential key approval may miss settlement windows for time-critical digital asset trades.

auth.notes: BitGo uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication with scopes. REST API with JSON and SDKs. Palo Alto, California HQ. Founded 2013 by Mike Belshe and Ben Davenport. Private (~$160M raised; attempted Galaxy Digital acquisition blocked by SEC in 2022). BitGo Trust Company is a regulated South Dakota trust company (qualified custodian). Multi-signature wallet technology (2-of-3 multi-sig). 700+ digital assets supported. BitGo Prime for lending and borrowing. Express API for automated signing. Processes ~20% of global Bitcoin transactions. Competes with Fireblocks, Anchorage Digital, and Copper for institutional digital asset custody.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise subscription for institutional custody
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise subscription based on assets under custody and transaction volume; BitGo Prime credit facility pricing separate; testnet environment for development
pricing.notes: Palo Alto CA. Private (~$160M raised). Enterprise subscription. AUC-based pricing. BitGo Prime separate. Testnet available. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; transaction and wallet queries throttled; webhooks for transaction and wallet events

known_agent_gotchas: MULTI-SIG SIGNING PARTY COORDINATION FOR AUTOMATED TRANSACTIONS: BitGo 2-of-3 multi-sig requires two signing parties to approve transactions; automated signing via BitGo Express server-side signing handles one signature; second signature from BitGo or user key still required; automated transaction workflows must coordinate signing party availability for time-sensitive settlement windows

BLOCKCHAIN CONFIRMATION DEPTH FOR SETTLEMENT FINALITY: BitGo transaction confirmation requirements vary by blockchain (Bitcoin requires 3-6 confirmations, Ethereum 12-36 for finality); automated settlement workflows must wait for required confirmation depth before considering transfer final; automated settlement that treats broadcast transaction as final creates premature settlement for counterparty credit

UTXO CONSOLIDATION FOR HIGH-VOLUME BITCOIN OPERATIONS: Bitcoin UTXO fragmentation from high-volume operations creates high transaction fees for large UTXO sets; automated Bitcoin operations via BitGo should implement periodic UTXO consolidation during low-fee periods; high UTXO fragmentation creates economically inefficient automated settlement for Bitcoin-heavy custodial operations

WEBHOOK DELIVERY GUARANTEE AND REPLAY: BitGo webhook delivery is best-effort; automated event-driven workflows must implement idempotent event processing and missed event recovery via polling; automated workflow that relies solely on BitGo webhooks without polling fallback may miss transaction events during webhook delivery failures

GALAXY DIGITAL ACQUISITION UNCERTAINTY: BitGo's attempted acquisition by Galaxy Digital was terminated in 2022 after SEC opposition; BitGo's ownership and strategic direction remains independent but acquisition attempts may recur; evaluate platform ownership stability for long-term enterprise custody automation dependency
agent_readiness.security_notes: Institutional digital asset custody. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2 + API key. US. Digital asset transactions, wallet keys, and institutional prime services data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Institutional crypto custody. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2 + API key. US. Digital asset transactions and multi-sig wallet data.
